_comment: Synthetic ADR-0007 R1 fixture — exercises the three correctness edge cases the resolver contract calls out: (1) dead heat at pos=2 (two placings entries share a pos, plus 2 quinella + 2 exacta payout rows that the resolver sums), (2) one scratch at the gate (umaban 4 marked 取消 — surfaces in `scratched`, triggers resolver state:'refunded' for any line containing 4), (3) one DNF mid-race (umaban 9 marked 中止 — NOT in `scratched`, no refund). This file is the build_result output; the producer would attach it verbatim to the race dict's `result` key. Feed to workers/social/src/settle.ts::resolveTicket to verify.
_placings_intended: 5 won; 16 and 7 dead-heated for 2nd; 1 alone at 3rd
_source_umabans_in_race: 1, 4, 5, 7, 9, 11, 16 (7-declared; 4 scratched at gate; 9 DNF mid-race; 5 placings paid)
